Video.summary: Follow hunter Jamey Mosch into the Florida everglades as his hunting trips turns into a four day nightmare.
Video.title: Fight To Survive | Jamey Mosch

Image.alt: Fight To Survive | Jamey Mosch
Fight To Survive | Jamey Mosch
Fight To Survive | Jamey Mosch

Video.summary: Ed Rosenthal set out for a short hike in Joshua Tree National Park, but in the heat of the day he became turned around and lost. His six-day ordeal of survival in blazing temperatures with no food or water is nothing short of miraculous.
Video.title: Fight To Survive | Under the Desert Sun

Image.alt: Fight To Survive | Under the Desert Sun
Fight To Survive | Under the Desert Sun
Fight To Survive | Under the Desert Sun

Video.summary: In an isolated mountain river, Fisherman Dean Ririe becomes hopelessly trapped under a boulder in water up to his neck. In icy waters that should kill a man, Dean fights for his life miles from help.
Video.title: Fight To Survive | A River's Grasp

Image.alt: Fight To Survive | A River's Grasp
Fight To Survive | A River's Grasp
Fight To Survive | A River's Grasp

Video.summary: After a successful hunt., Adrian Knopps' hunting partner disappears taking their bear out to the boat. Now Adrian finds himself stranded on a tidal flat surround by bears and wolf packs and with massive storm bearing down on him. How will he survive?
Video.title: Fight To Survive | Stranded in the Alaska Wilderness Part 2

Image.alt: Fight To Survive | Stranded in the Alaska Wilderness Part 2
Fight To Survive | Stranded in the Alaska Wilderness Part 2
Fight To Survive | Stranded in the Alaska Wilderness Part 2

Video.summary: Follow hunter Jamey Mosch into the Florida everglades as his hunting trips turns into a four day nightmare.
Video.title: Fight To Survive | Jamey Mosch

Image.alt: Fight To Survive | Jamey Mosch

Video.summary: A man gets trapped in his pickup after a high-speed collision; a car fire raises suspicions of foul play.
Video.title: Hellfire Heroes | Wheels That Fail

Image.alt: Hellfire Heroes | Wheels That Fail
Hellfire Heroes | Wheels That Fail
Hellfire Heroes | Wheels That Fail

Video.summary: Trouble during a training session; a rollover traps 4 people and ejects 2 others into a swift-moving river.
Video.title: Hellfire Heroes | What It Takes

Image.alt: Hellfire Heroes | What It Takes
Hellfire Heroes | What It Takes
Hellfire Heroes | What It Takes

Video.summary: While the Chief is out of town, a house fire breaks out in a remote part of Slave Lake.
Video.title: Hellfire Heroes | Trial By Fire

Image.alt: Hellfire Heroes | Trial By Fire
Hellfire Heroes | Trial By Fire
Hellfire Heroes | Trial By Fire

Video.summary: Firefighters perform a ride inspection at a travelling carnival; firefighters extinguish a blazing ATV.
Video.title: Hellfire Heroes | Endless Summer

Image.alt: Hellfire Heroes | Endless Summer
Hellfire Heroes | Endless Summer
Hellfire Heroes | Endless Summer

Video.summary: Firefighters race to rescue a trapped child; a truck loaded with flammable welding tanks burns out of control.
Video.title: Hellfire Heroes | Jack-Of-All-Trades

Image.alt: Hellfire Heroes | Jack-Of-All-Trades
Hellfire Heroes | Jack-Of-All-Trades
Hellfire Heroes | Jack-Of-All-Trades

Video.summary: Firefighters burn grass fields hoping to prevent a repeat of the 2011 wildfires that devastated the town.
Video.title: Hellfire Heroes | Wildfire Season

Image.alt: Hellfire Heroes | Wildfire Season
Hellfire Heroes | Wildfire Season
Hellfire Heroes | Wildfire Season

Video.summary: Firefighters and survivors share their stories; experts discuss the reality of wildfires.
Video.title: Hellfire Heroes | Not If, But When

Image.alt: Hellfire Heroes | Not If, But When
Hellfire Heroes | Not If, But When
Hellfire Heroes | Not If, But When

Video.summary: A springtime blizzard has firefighters working overtime; a pickup hits a semi; a space heater sparks a fire.
Video.title: Hellfire Heroes | Weather Extremes

Image.alt: Hellfire Heroes | Weather Extremes
Hellfire Heroes | Weather Extremes
Hellfire Heroes | Weather Extremes

Video.summary: The countdown has begun as we prepare for some of the most extreme weather caught on camera!
Video.title: Extreme Weather Countdown | It's All Downfall from Here

Image.alt: Extreme Weather Countdown | It's All Downfall from Here
Extreme Weather Countdown | It's All Downfall from Here
Extreme Weather Countdown | It's All Downfall from Here

Video.summary: From Florida's shores to Australia's outback, we traveled the world to collect videos that will blow you away.
Video.title: Extreme Weather Countdown | The One Where Lightning Strikes Twice

Image.alt: Extreme Weather Countdown | The One Where Lightning Strikes Twice
Extreme Weather Countdown | The One Where Lightning Strikes Twice
Extreme Weather Countdown | The One Where Lightning Strikes Twice

Video.summary: Are you ready for some electricyfing weather videos? Because we've got it all...wind storms, flashfloods, and even hurricanes! We've pulled together some of the craziest weather you've ever seen!
Video.title: Extreme Weather Countdown | The Cold Never Bothered Me Anyway

Image.alt: Extreme Weather Countdown | The Cold Never Bothered Me Anyway
Extreme Weather Countdown | The Cold Never Bothered Me Anyway
Extreme Weather Countdown | The Cold Never Bothered Me Anyway

Video.summary: Get ready, because it's time once again to watch some of the wildest weather videos you've ever seen! From thunderstorms to tornadoes, hail to flooding, we've got it all
Video.title: Extreme Weather Countdown | My Trashcan is Gone with the Wind

Image.alt: Extreme Weather Countdown | My Trashcan is Gone with the Wind
Extreme Weather Countdown | My Trashcan is Gone with the Wind
Extreme Weather Countdown | My Trashcan is Gone with the Wind

Video.summary: The world is a dangerous place, and with wild weather occurances happening every 20 seconds, it's no wonder we never have a shortage of footage to showcase here. The videos we have gathered are guarenteed to blow you away, so let's not waste anymore time and jump right into it.
Video.title: Extreme Weather Countdown | Throwing Porta Potties to the Wind

Image.alt: Extreme Weather Countdown | Throwing Porta Potties to the Wind
Extreme Weather Countdown | Throwing Porta Potties to the Wind
Extreme Weather Countdown | Throwing Porta Potties to the Wind

Video.summary: What's windy, wild, and wet all over? The weather, of course!
Video.title: Extreme Weather Countdown | Oh Hail No

Image.alt: Extreme Weather Countdown | Oh Hail No
Extreme Weather Countdown | Oh Hail No
Extreme Weather Countdown | Oh Hail No

Video.summary: When bad weather strikes, most people head in doors, but we head right into the heart of it.
Video.title: Extreme Weather Countdown | The Final Countdown

Image.alt: Extreme Weather Countdown | The Final Countdown
Extreme Weather Countdown | The Final Countdown
Extreme Weather Countdown | The Final Countdown

Video.summary: Rain. Snow. Lightning. Hurricanes. Dust devils. When these weather phenomena combine, it's usually a recipe for disaster. But on this show, it's just another normal day in the books. It's time for Extreme Weather Countdown!
Video.title: Extreme Weather Countdown | Slip and Mudslide

Image.alt: Extreme Weather Countdown | Slip and Mudslide
Extreme Weather Countdown | Slip and Mudslide
Extreme Weather Countdown | Slip and Mudslide
